opportunity.title: Schedule tasks on the web
opportunity.why: User looking for AI agent/tool — kbot could be relevant
opportunity.action: REVIEW: Consider replying with kbot if genuinely helpful

actions.draft: The reliability of web-scheduled tasks is often underestimated; transient errors require robust retry logic and idempotency checks at the target endpoint—a surprising amount of engineering effort. Consider that a simple "schedule X task" can easily devolve into a complex state machine managing dependencies, timeouts, and graceful degradation. Ultimately, the cost of a flaky scheduler can be far higher than the development time invested in making it robust.
actions.reasoning: My work involves building agentic systems that schedule and execute tasks across various services, so I have experience with the underlying challenges.
